basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 30 Specialist, Senior Resident and Super Specialist Posts
basic_details.post_name: Super Specialist, Specialist and Senior Resident
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Udyogamandal has released the official Super Specialist, Specialist and Senior Resident Notification 2026 on 06 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 30 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Super Specialist, Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 69 years for Super Specialists/Specialists and up to 45 years for Senior Residents, with a qualification of MBBS + Postgraduate Degree/Diploma/DM/DNB in the relevant specialty, can attend the walk-in interview on 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and

age_limit.age_details: Max 69 years for Super Specialists/Specialists, Max 45 years for Senior Residents.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Super Specialists/Specialists is 69 years. Maximum age limit for Senior Residents is 45 years. Relaxation for reserved categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + Postgraduate Degree/Diploma/DM/DNB in relevant specialty
qualification.details: Full Time Super Specialist (FTSS) / Part Time Super Specialist (PTSS): MBBS + MD/MS + DM/DNB in respective super-specialty Full Time Specialist (FTS) / Part Time Specialist (PTS): MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident: PG Degree/Diploma preferred or MBBS + 2 years experience

vacancy_details.Post Name: Full Time Super Specialist (FTSS) / Part Time Super Specialist (PTSS)
Full Time Specialist (FTS) / Part Time Specialist (PTS)

salary_details.details: Full Time Super Specialist (FTSS) / Part Time Super Specialist (PTSS): Rs. 1,00,000 - Rs. 2,40,000 Per Month (Consolidated) Full Time Specialist (FTS) / Part Time Specialist (PTS): Rs. 60,000 - Rs. 1,76,541 Per Month (Consolidated) Senior Resident: Rs. 1,51,025 - Rs. 1,53,275 Per Month (Consolidated)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Super Specialist / Specialist / Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: A total of 30 vacancies are available for the Super Specialist / Specialist / Senior Resident posts at ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident post, a PG Degree/Diploma is preferred, or candidates with MBBS and 2 years of experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Full Time Specialist (FTS) / Part Time Specialist (PTS) posts ranges from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 1,76,541 per month on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 50/-. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists is 69 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal Recruitment 2026 being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ESIC Hospital Udyogamandal office. The exact address and reporting time will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Are women candidates exempted from paying the application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.
